title: Fix all broken backend, frontend, auth, and date utility issues

requirements.text: Audit and fix all broken or non-functional backend Motoko logic in backend/main.mo, including any compile errors, incorrect access control logic, broken CRUD operations for machines, and any issues with user profile management or admin/user role handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin and user role-based access control works correctly
Machine CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) all function correctly
User profile management operations work without errors

requirements.text: Audit and fix all frontend issues across all pages and components, including broken React Query hooks in useQueries.ts, incorrect data fetching or mutation logic, broken modal dialogs (AddMachineModal, EditMachineModal, DeleteConfirmDialog, RescheduleDateModal), malfunctioning alert banners (DueTodayAlertBanner, OverdueAlertBanner), and any rendering errors or broken UI interactions in Dashboard.tsx and AddContactDetailsPage.tsx.
acceptanceCriteria: All React Query hooks in useQueries.ts fetch and mutate data correctly with proper cache invalidation
AddMachineModal and EditMachineModal open, validate, and submit correctly
DeleteConfirmDialog and RescheduleDateModal function without errors
DueTodayAlertBanner and OverdueAlertBanner display correct machines and dismiss properly
Dashboard.tsx renders without errors and all interactions work

requirements.text: Fix all issues in the app's authentication and onboarding flow: ensure Internet Identity login correctly triggers the AddContactDetailsPage for new users and the Dashboard for returning users, and that logout properly resets the per-principal localStorage state.
acceptanceCriteria: New users are directed to AddContactDetailsPage after logging in via Internet Identity
Returning users with completed onboarding are directed to Dashboard after login
Logout clears per-principal localStorage state correctly
Identity change detection in App.tsx works reliably

requirements.text: Fix all issues with date utilities in frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts, including correct conversion between IC nanosecond timestamps and JavaScript Dates, accurate machine cleaning status computation (ok, due-soon, due-today, overdue), and correct next-due-date calculation logic.
acceptanceCriteria: IC nanosecond timestamps are correctly converted to and from JavaScript Date objects
Machine cleaning status (ok, due-soon, due-today, overdue) is computed accurately based on next-due date
StatsBar and StatusBadge reflect correct statuses derived from dateUtils

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor file
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond fixing existing broken functionality
Changing the overall app design or color scheme
Renaming any further text beyond what was already completed in the 'Machine Part' to 'Machine Cleaning' feature
